title: Marathon Digital Holdings Reports Second Quarter 2023 Results
text: Marathon Digital Holdings reported Q2 2023 results. The company grew its energized hash rate 54% from 11.5 to 17.7 exahashes. Marathon produced a record 2,926 bitcoin during the second quarter, representing approximately 3.3% of the Bitcoin network rewards available during the period. The company recorded a net loss of $21.3 million, or $0.13 per share, during the three months ended June 30, 2023. Revenues were $81.8 million for the quarter, significantly above second quarter 2022 revenues of $24.9 million, as a 314% increase in bitcoin production more than offset 14% lower average bitcoin prices. Marathon exited the quarter with $113.7 million in unrestricted cash and approximately 12,538 bitcoin with market value of approximately $380 million.
